Dataset — Project 3: Barcode & QR Code Scanner and Localizer
=============================================================
Course      : Introduction to Computer Vision
Institution : ESIN, UIR — Spring 2026
Instructor  : Ilias TOUGUI

Contents
--------
This folder contains the input images used to test the
scanner pipeline. All images were found or captured
manually (no programmatic generation).

Image sources:
  - Photos taken with a smartphone (real product barcodes)
  - Screenshots of QR codes displayed on screens
  - Downloaded sample images (libre/open licence)

Input images (8):
  - BarCode_QRCode.png  : image with 1D barcode + QR code (mixed)
  - Barcode.jpeg        : real product barcode photo
  - BarCode007.jpg      : EAN-13 product barcode
  - BarCode015.jpg      : EAN-13 product barcode
  - BarCode019.jpg      : EAN-13 product barcode
  - QRCode01.png        : QR code
  - QRCode02.jpg        : QR code 
  - QRCode03.jpg        : QR code 

Code types present:
  - QRCODE  : square matrix codes (URL, text, payloads)
  - EAN-13  : standard 13-digit retail product barcode

Output files (generated by the pipeline):
  - result_*.png/jpg               : annotated result per image
  - cv_concepts_visualization.png  : 7-panel CV concepts figure
  - evaluation_chart.png           : bar chart of detections

Group Members: IKRAM OIALILI, MANAL SAWLI, SAOUSAN ELHAROUCHI
